chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-129 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on CMA 439/25 3.For hearing of main case 04-12-2025 None present for the petitioners. **** None present for the petitioners; no intimation is received. Even on the last two consecutive dates of hearing, none was in attendance on behalf of the petitioners, which reflects that the petitioners and their counsel have lost interest in pursuing this matter. Resultantly, the instant Constitutional Petition along with listed application(s) is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
